author: FAN
description: Non-invasive side comments and reading annotations for Obsidian Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: FAN
manifest.description: Side comments and visual marks for Markdown notes, stored outside the note body.
manifest.name: Side Comments

name: Side Comments

releases.author: guoxueziliao
releases.description:
Release and review hardening.

- LICENSE copyright updated from TBD to FAN
- manifest.json and README aligned with official Obsidian conventions
- Settings headings converted to Setting.setHeading() API
- Data directory setting description updated
- All four validation checklist groups verified

releases.author: guoxueziliao
releases.description:
## 0.7.0 - Data Maintenance Build-out

- Added JSON export format v2 with annotation type and tag fields.
- Updated Markdown exports to show Mark, Annotation type, Color, and Tags.
- Added JSON import preview with restore-to-original-path and import-into-current-document modes.
- Added backup batches under `.obsidian-side-comments/.backups/` for import and repair writes.
- Added a health check view with severity filters, issue categories, and source navigation.
- Added orphaned rebind confirmation, duplicate annotation repair actions, and confirmed cleanup for deleted-source annotation data.
releases.name: 0.7.0 - Data Maintenance Build-out

releases.author: guoxueziliao
releases.description: Updated the plugin description to comply with community directory validation rules.

releases.author: guoxueziliao
releases.description:
# Changelog

## 0.1.0

- Added non-invasive sidecar storage under `.obsidian-side-comments/`.
- Added source mode and reading mode annotation creation from selected text.
- Added highlight, underline, strikethrough, and comment entry points.
- Added editor and reading view visual mark rendering.
- Added current-document sidebar with edit, delete, resolve, search, filter, and jump actions.
- Added lazy current-document loading for large vaults.
- Added conservative anchor relocation after document edits.
- Added sidecar schema metadata and lazy migration support.
- Fixed case-only rename handling for Windows-to-WSL development and Linux vaults.
- Replaced icon-only MVP controls with visible short text labels for reliable local rendering.
